visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a woman with voluminous, curly blonde hair. She is in a crowded, brightly lit indoor space, possibly a restaurant or bar, with other patrons blurred in the background. Her mouth is wide open as if she is shouting with intense emotion. Behind her, a man in a blue shirt and a dark baseball cap looks on with a concerned or surprised expression. The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a man with dark, wavy hair and a beard. He wears a patterned sweater over a collared shirt. He stares forward with a wide-eyed, intense, and slightly shocked look, his face filling the frame. The background remains a bustling but out-of-focus public setting. The shot returns to the blonde woman, who continues to shout with great passion. The camera is shaky, emphasizing her agitated state. The man in the baseball cap is still visible in the background, his expression unchanged. A woman's voice, high-pitched and filled with frantic energy, repeatedly screams, "Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes!"
